prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-JRCTKHDWJB-BUN-23PC-LG-MLT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Jewelry Repair Tool Kit Homemade DIY Watches Jewelry Bracelets 23pc Description: The Yellow and Black Tool Kit is perfect for any jewelers collection. All tools included are of the highest quality, assuring that you will have an easy-going experience when working on your jewelry making and repairs.

Use our tools for repairs on jewelry such as watches, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, rings, and more. We guarantee that our tool kit will bring you the results that you want, leaving you with the perfect piece of jewelry. Search Terms: jewelers repair toolbox jewelry kit Features: - Complete 23 piece kit for repair - Multicolored Pieces - Perfect for jewelers of all experience levels === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 23-pc Multicolor Jewelry Repair Kit

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 23-pc Yellow And Black Jewelry Repair Tool Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Complete 23-Piece Set, Watches, Necklaces, Bracelets, Earrings, Rings, All Skill Levels

openai.title_differentiation: Complete 23 Piece Set, High Quality Tools, Multi Colored Pieces, For Watches Jewelry And Repair Projects
